summary.decision: The documented GCP BigQuery batch surface is stable-supported.
summary.basis: Real GCP BigQuery and BigLake validation reports cover GCS load formats, explicit-column MERGE, bronze-to-gold execution, evidence writes, failed-run evidence, row access policy enforcement, direct masking, policy-tag column access, BigQuery descriptions, governance-ledger evidence write/readback, non-mutating governance reconciliation readback, additive_only/permissive nullable schema-policy enforcement, strict schema-policy failure evidence, destructive type-change schema evidence, SQL-source schema enforcement, GCS/load-family schema enforcement, the automatic type-mutation review boundary, registered BigLake Iceberg table reads, raw Iceberg BigLake registration command/readback, public/no-auth REST/HTTP materialization, live http_text and generic http_file text/JSON/CSV project execution, live http_file Avro/ORC/Parquet pass-through load materialization, authenticated REST/HTTP Secret Manager runtime resolution, live REST API-key and HTTP JSON bearer/API-key Secret Manager variants, compact opt-in advanced write-mode replay smokes, hash-diff changed-wave and null/duplicate key preflight smokes, hash-diff production benchmark and overlap serialization, accepted cross-adapter hash_diff_upsert production parity, historical delete-expression and late-arriving reject smokes, snapshot complete-source reactivation and tombstone smokes, historical/snapshot production benchmarks, native Dataplex data-quality DataScan execution/export readback, explicit native Dataplex lineage/aspect execution/readback, the explicit Dataplex runtime decision, generated Workflows runner deploy/execute/readback, adapter-owned Workflows command-path readback, runner-side run/quality/schema evidence, quality failed-row semantics, execution-scoped evidence ids, workflow cleanup, write-failure run evidence, target/evidence cleanup and repeated Workflows full-project rerun execution/readback. Source-review, non-JDBC source-family promotion plans, raw Iceberg BigLake registration plans, Delta/Delta Sharing Dataproc materialization plans, Kafka/Event Hubs Dataflow promotion plans plus an executable Dataflow source-promotion command/readback surface and live Confluent Dataflow streaming provider evidence for row ingestion, zero-DLQ reconciliation and no-input replay, authenticated REST/HTTP Secret Manager review, schema-policy, advanced write-mode review, Dataplex data-quality create plus execution/readback command, native Dataplex lineage/aspect planning plus explicit command surface, governance ledger/reconciliation and Workflows runner artifacts, including bounded BigQuery job polling, connector retry planning, a Workflows execution-plan artifact, broad/execution-scoped evidence-readback artifacts, a cleanup-plan artifact and `bq` readback/reset/cleanup command paths, are generated as deterministic planning surfaces.
summary.scope_limit: Streaming, advanced write modes, automatic type widening/mutation, non-Workflows deployment runners, automatic native Dataplex lineage/aspect emission during every contract run, direct raw Iceberg path query execution without registration, JDBC/Delta Sharing, inline authenticated REST/HTTP credentials, governance auto-repair/delete and overwrite-retention certification are explicit exclusions from this stable-final claim.

verification_commands.name: gcp_status_report
verification_commands.command: PYTHONPATH=.;src;adapters/gcp/src uv run python -m contractforge_gcp.cli stabilization-report

verification_commands.name: strict_final_boundary
verification_commands.command: PYTHONPATH=.;src;adapters/gcp/src uv run python -m contractforge_gcp.cli stabilization-report --strict-final

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_bigquery_schema_policy_gcs_source_smoke
validated_surfaces: declared-schema GCS load source schema probe

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_bigquery_governance_smokes
validated_surfaces: policy-tag column access deny-before-grant and allow-after-grant

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_governance_ledger_evidence_smoke
validated_surfaces: governance evidence write/readback for declared governance intent
principal redaction before SQL execution and readback

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_governance_ledger_reconciliation_smoke
validated_surfaces: BigQuery table and column description readback

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_raw_iceberg_registration_smoke
validated_surfaces: BigLake Iceberg registration from a declared raw GCS prefix

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_http_sources_bigquery_smoke
validated_surfaces: contract-only generic http_file text project step
contract-only generic http_file JSON project step
contract-only generic http_file CSV project step
run, lineage and quality evidence where declared

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_http_file_binary_bigquery_smoke
validated_surfaces: contract-only generic http_file Avro project step
contract-only generic http_file ORC project step
contract-only generic http_file Parquet project step
shared core HTTP reader with explicit private-target fixture opt-in

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_bigquery_advanced_write_smoke
validated_surfaces: run and lineage evidence for opt-in review-required execution

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_bigquery_advanced_write_preflight_smoke
validated_surfaces: hash_diff_upsert no-change replay after changed-row replay
failed run and lineage evidence for preflight failures

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_bigquery_historical_edge_smoke
validated_surfaces: historical delete-expression expiration without replacement current row
failed run and lineage evidence for late-arriving rejection
negative-run target readback proving no mutation

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_bigquery_snapshot_variant_smoke
validated_surfaces: run and lineage evidence for first-run and replay MERGE jobs

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_bigquery_hashdiff_production_benchmark
validated_surfaces: null and duplicate merge-key failed evidence
overlapping contract executions serialized by BigQuery mutating DML
DML row counts, bytes processed and slot-ms metrics

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_bigquery_advanced_write_production_benchmark
validated_surfaces: 10,000-row historical initial load and no-change replay
historical changed-row wave and delete-expression expiration
10,000-row snapshot initial load and no-change replay
snapshot tombstone replay and reactivation wave
DML row counts, bytes processed and slot-ms metrics

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_workflows_command_readback_smoke
validated_surfaces: platform executable resolution for gcloud and bq
single-line bq readback SQL execution on Windows

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_workflows_runner_evidence_smoke
validated_surfaces: runner-side run evidence after successful write operations
runner-side quality evidence after successful quality query operations
readback of run evidence by target table
readback of quality evidence by contract
schema-policy evidence validated in the schema evidence smoke and certified runner smoke

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_workflows_quality_semantics_smoke
validated_surfaces: PASSED quality evidence when failed_rows equals zero
FAILED quality evidence when failed_rows is greater than zero
generated Workflows raise after failed quality evidence persistence
long generated Workflows step IDs remain unique

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_workflows_execution_runid_smoke
validated_surfaces: run evidence uses execution-scoped run_id values
PASSED quality evidence uses execution-scoped run_id values
FAILED quality evidence uses execution-scoped run_id values
rerun evidence rows are distinguishable by workflow execution id

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_workflows_schema_evidence_smoke
validated_surfaces: runner-side schema evidence rows for schema-policy contracts
schema evidence ids scoped to the native Workflows execution id
schema-policy plan status preserved in schema_changes_json
schema drift enforcement remains governed by the schema-policy gate

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_workflows_cleanup_command_smoke
validated_surfaces: generated gcloud workflows delete command metadata

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_workflows_write_failure_evidence_smoke
validated_surfaces: generated Workflows failed write/load run evidence
FAILED run evidence before workflow raise

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_workflows_certified_runner_smoke
validated_surfaces: execution-scoped target/readback evidence for two real executions
runner-side run, quality and schema evidence readback per execution

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_dataplex_data_quality_execution_smoke
validated_surfaces: BigQuery export readback with seven rule result rows
10,000-row target scanned by native Dataplex data quality
low Dataplex API quota handled with bounded polling and retries

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_dataplex_lineage_aspects_smoke
validated_surfaces: explicit native Dataplex lineage publication/readback command path
run-scoped native lineageEvents readback with expected source and target
Dataplex AspectType schema with required stable field indexes

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_dataplex_lineage_aspect_runtime_decision
validated_surfaces: explicit native Dataplex command surface remains stable-supported
automatic native Dataplex mutation remains excluded from ordinary contract execution
normal contract runs keep neutral OpenLineage control-table evidence as the automatic lineage surface

real_validation_projects.name: gcp_confluent_kafka_dataflow_source_promotion_smoke
validated_surfaces: Confluent Cloud SASL/PLAIN Secret Manager binding
same-consumer-group no-input replay with unchanged target count

accepted_review_boundaries.area: raw Iceberg path, Delta/Delta Sharing, undeclared/unsupported HTTP file variants and streaming source execution
Workflows, Cloud Run Jobs, Composer DAGs and scheduled-query runners
automatic BigQuery type widening or type mutation
native Dataplex lineage and Knowledge Catalog aspects
tag-based masking, auto-repair and overwrite retention

next_promotion_gates.name: historical and snapshot production parity
next_promotion_gates.requires: cross-adapter production-sized parity acceptance for historical and snapshot_reconcile_soft_delete contracts beyond the recorded GCP and Fabric evidence.

next_promotion_gates.name: expanded source families
next_promotion_gates.requires: Delta Sharing, direct raw Iceberg path execution without registration, undeclared/unsupported HTTP file variants and other non-JDBC source-family E2E validation without workaround code.

do_not_claim: live Delta Sharing, direct raw Iceberg path or non-JDBC source-family execution parity
stable historical or snapshot soft-delete support beyond the review-required advanced write evidence already recorded
automatic BigQuery type widening or type mutation
automatic native Dataplex lineage/aspect emission during every contract run
